docs.text: Awesome Tools A curated list of awesome tools for dev, design, and life. Inspired by awesome-python . Awesome Tools Backend Dev Branding Design Frontend Dev Language LaTeX Life Miscellaneous Life Aerial - a very nice Mac screensaver (Yes, it works with recent Mac version that SaveHollywood gave up; so please buy them a coffee) Archive.org-Downloader - Python3 script for downloading archive.org books in PDF format bilibili-downloader - Bilibili 4K 视频下载 Handbrake - The best free open source video format converter. HoYo-Glyphs - 原神提瓦特文 字体文件 Mousecape - 可莉像素指针 Mac 版 运行工具 Project Gutenberg - Free books for read and data analytics TiddlyDesktop Genymobile gnirehtet - Allows Android devices to use the internet connection of the computer they are plugged on scrcpy - Mirroring our Android screens onto our Mac screens and monitors sndcpy - scrpy companion: forwarding audio from an Android 10 device to the computer 原神角色 AI 语音合成器 - 择原神角色，输入文本，生成语音，可下载 Branding HashiCorp TypeScript Machine Learning MIT Deep Learning Book Llama 2 A comprehensive guide to running Llama 2 locally Ollama Design SVG/LOGO Brandfetch Worldvectorlogo API Stylebook Design Guidelines Digital Transformation Discourse - A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple. LaTeX CTAN - The "Maven Central" for LaTeX MacTeX - LaTeX comes with various installation packges, some are minimized versions. The comprehensive package is MacTeX texlive package manager - Installing a LaTeX package. e.g. sudo tlmgr update --self && sudo tlmgr install pgfornament Popular CTAN Packages tcolorbox Frontend Dev Defensive CSS npm trends The Modern JavaScript Tutorial UI Performance Lighthouse CI Action - Maintained by third party, no GitHub App install required, no dedicated UI report hosting server required Lighthouse CI - Maintained by Google, GitHub App install required, UI report hosting requires dedicated server Lighthouse PageSpeed Insights Performance Budget Calculator Request Map Generator Third Party Web Mock Backend json-graphql-server json-server - Quick back-end for prototyping and mocking lowdb - Simple to use type-safe local JSON database Backend Dev API Platform (also checkout this interesting startup ) Generate SQL DB Schema Diagram get.docker.com - Installing Docker on Linux with an automated script JSON to JSON Schema converter online Java Defensive Copy Java Decompiler Java Generics FAQs jConsole Learning Java via Jenkov VisualVM Diagnostic Tools The jhat Utility The jinfo Utility The jmap Utility The jps Utility The jstack Utility The jstat Utility GraphQL gqt - Build and execute GraphQL queries in the terminal GraphiQL online Database MySQL Tutorial Oracle Tutorial OpenStack Swift Docker Language Lexilogos - A comprehensive set of resources for the study of the languages of the world Quizlet - Vocabulary was made very fun by this awesome app! Textkit Greek and Latin Forums Korean Papago - The best Korean dictionary. Make sure to download their mobile APP 延世大学韩国语教材全套(1-6册) 李思皎韩语 Ancient Greek Ancient Greek Dictionary Ancient Greek Language resources on Reddit Hansen and Quinn "Greek an intensive course" A full set of translations for the exercises in all twenty chapters Complementary materials Hansen and Quinn Videos by PlayGreek Partial answer keys for the textbook Old Persian Old Persian Keyboard Online • Cuneiforms Miscellaneous Bit Twiddling Hacks command-not-found.com - Dealing with "command not found" Error Convert curl command to programming language code Convert JSON to YAML Escape/Unescape Tool Greasy Fork - A nice browser per-website customization such as de-流氓 script by Bilibili martinfowler.com Online JSON formatter Online Self-Signed SSL Certificate Generator Tool for Website Random String Generator smee.io - Webhook payload delivery service Software architecture tools Unix Time Stamp - Epoch Converter URL Decoder/Encoder Contributing Your contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at the contribution guidelines first. I will keep some pull requests open if I'm not sure whether those libraries are awesome, you could vote for them by adding :+1: to them. Pull requests will be merged when their votes reach 20 . License The use and distribution terms for awesome-tools are covered by the Apache License, Version 2.0 . If you have any question about this opinionated list, do not hesitate to contact me or open an issue on GitHub.
